title: Be Your Own Original
html:
Be Your Own Original

Stub. The teen-Yahir corrective to mimicking-to-impress, written to himself in second person after seeing Alexandria's drawing in July 2019: "That's not it chief, be you own original [self], that's how you impress her." (2019 07 28 alexandrias drawing of a person or almost a silhouette on a). Companion to normal neutral to everything — both are early identity-construction moves: refuse the mimic-strategy, locate value in differentiation. The same instinct surfaces later in 2019 09 26 youre only chance of getting into stanford is to start a bus (build a business, don't follow the standard path).

Source summaries

  • 2019 07 28 alexandrias drawing of a person or almost a silhouette on a

Connections

normal neutral to everything · fear of not doing · alexandria nagy · grants pass teen era
